en.title: Kaliningrad, where Russia infiltrates the West
en.description:
Kaliningrad belongs to Russia, but it is separated from the rest of the territory. To get to Moscow you have to go through two other states. That is why it is considered an exclave.

The city is located on the Baltic Sea, near Poland and Lithuania. There is no Russian territory that is further west.

Why does it belong to Russia? Are there tensions in the current context? In addition, we propose a mathematical approach that was inspired by the bridges of this city.

ð Un Mundo Inmenso

We are proud to announce the anime adaptation of âJoJoâs Bizarre Adventure: Stone Oceanâ !!

Fairouz Ai is to voice Jolyne Cujoh!


ï― Comment from Fairouz Ai ï―

I cannot live without âJoJoâs Bizarre Adventureâ series and it is also what aspired me to take voice acting as a profession.
So when I heard that I was going to be able to participate in the series, I was lost for word and surprised that âEven a Stand would be blown to the moonâ.
I cried so much as it was literally the moment my dream came true, which I have chased over for 12years.

I love and admire Jolyne as a character and her beautiful, strong nature gave me strength especially during my student years, so I am really grateful for the opportunity to voice Jolyne.

Jolyne Cujoh is the most brave, beautiful, strong, and compassionate character I ever came across. My admiration towards her has not changed in 12 years. I am thrilled to be able to go on a âbizarre adventureâ with her and hope I will be able to gain Jolyneâs âthat kind of strengthâ through acting with everything I have.

Ya llevo tiempo saliendo con ella, yo estoy en la mÃ­a y ella en la de ella
Aunque todavÃ­a le duele se puso bella, se que hoy quiere ver las estrellas
Yo me deje de mi gata, te fuiste pa la calle y te pusiste sata,
Yo te llamo y me picheas por texto pero por dentro quiere que te parta

Mami por ti me voy a toa, baby yo estoy pa ti no me voy a quitar,
Yo te quito el gistro y el la libertad, te pongo mojaita sin tener que bajar
Yo Te quiero comer toa, baby yo estoy pa ti no me voy a quitar,

Por donde el no te da, yo te doy, tirame la ubi que por ahi voy,
A ti te gustan los cheques que explotamos, yo te regalo Gucci y el te da Ferragamo
La disco es tuya la compramos, tengo la funda sin vender gramos

Ponte las cartier que nos vamos pal mall, me vio la guagua y me dijo mi amor
No quiere una semana, solo quiere un dia de sol

No quiere una semana, solo quiere un dia de sol)

snippet.title: Historias Innecesarias, con DamiÃĄn Kuc | Mitos en el Vaticano
snippet.description:
Muchos son los mitos que esconde el vaticano, pero en esta nueva entrega de HISTORIAS INNECESARIAS, DamiÃĄn Kuc relatarÃĄ dos de los mÃĄs curiosos.
Se dice que en el siglo IX una mujer se hizo pasar por hombre, para tomar el rol de Papa, o Papisa en este caso, bajo el nombre de Benedicto III. SegÃšn cuenta la leyenda, la historia no terminÃģ muy bien, ÂŋpodrÃ­a ser por ella que se creÃģ el supuesto oficio de palpati?
Otro mito de la iglesia catÃģlica que saliÃģ a la luz en los Ãšltimos tiempos, tiene que ver con una lista profÃĐtica de mÃĄs de 800 aÃąos, que contendrÃ­a los nombres y descripciones de los 112 sumos pontÃ­fices, que pasarÃ­an por el vaticano. ÂŋRealmente la lista termina con Francisco Bergoglio como el Papa del Apocalipsis?

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! ð


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter âš https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram âšhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook âšhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Â­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: El caballo mÃĄs peligroso - parte 2 - Quitando miedos en caballos - Doma racional - Pablo Saldarriaga
snippet.description:
#DomaRacional #DomadorDeCecaballos #thehorsewhisperer #PabloSaldarriaga 

Continuamos trabajando con este hermoso caballo lleno de miedos, poco a poco el caballo va cambiado su pensamiento y empieza a aceptarme. 

Seguimos el trabajo con el dumie ya vemos que lo empieza a soportar y mantiene un comportamiento mas mesurado, su respiraciÃģn empieza a regularse y sus miedos empiezan a desplazarse.


Es muy importante la paciencia, el respeto y la constancia para que los resultados empiecen a reflejarse.

BY: @caballoecuestre

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
âYou really find out whoâs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.â
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovatoâs new song, âDancing With The Devilâ: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovatoâs new album âDancing With The DevilâĶ The Art Of Starting Overâ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

snippet.title: Star Wars: The Bad Batch | Official Trailer | Disney+
snippet.description:
Check out the brand-new trailer for Lucasfilmâs âStar Wars: The Bad Batch,â an original animated series launching exclusively on Disney+. âStar Wars: The Bad Batchâ makes its debut on Tuesday, May 4, with a special 70-minute premiere, followed by new episodes every Friday starting on May 7. 

 

âStar Wars: The Bad Batchâ follows the elite and experimental clones of the Bad Batch (first introduced in âThe Clone Warsâ) as they find their way in a rapidly changing galaxy in the immediate aftermath of the Clone War. Members of Bad Batchâa unique squad of clones who vary genetically from their brothers in the Clone Armyâeach possess a singular exceptional skill that makes them extraordinarily effective soldiers and a formidable crew.

 

âStar Wars: The Bad Batchâ is executive produced by Dave Filoni (âThe Mandalorian,â âStar Wars: The Clone Warsâ), Athena Portillo (âStar Wars: The Clone Wars,â âStar Wars Rebelsâ), Brad Rau (âStar Wars Rebels,â âStar Wars Resistanceâ) and Jennifer Corbett (âStar Wars Resistance,â âNCISâ) with Carrie Beck (âThe Mandalorian,â âStar Wars Rebelsâ) as co-executive producer and Josh Rimes as producer (âStar Wars Resistanceâ). Rau is also serving as supervising director with Corbett as head writer.    

 

Visit StarWars.com for more exciting news on the series.

Llevaba varios dÃ­as recorriendo las calles de CaracasâĶ Ya habÃ­a conocido algunos de los barrios populares que se encuentran al oeste de la ciudadâĶ viajÃĐ hasta el otro extremo para conocer las zonas en donde viven los millonariosâĶ CaminÃĐ por las calles del centro para aprender sobre su historia, para entender la actualidadâĶ Pero sobre todo para conocer a la gente que cada dÃ­a sale a las calles de Caracas con una gran actitud por darlo todo para sacar adelante a su paÃ­sâĶ De hecho eran tantas mis ganas de explorar este ciudad, que en un momento de sed y antojos durante una noche y tal vez un poco de locuraâĶ SalÃ­ de mi hotel para recorrer las obscuras y solitarias calles de Caracas en busca de una tienditaâĶ

Y mientras todo esto sucedÃ­aâĶ HabÃ­a un personaje muy importante y querido por todos los habitantes de CaracasâĶ Que observaba atento y en silencio cada movimiento que yo hacÃ­aâĶ Al igual que observa durante dÃ­a y noche la vida de todos los habitantes de esta ciudadâĶ Como si se tratara de un vigilante gigante al cual todos los caraqueÃąos le tienen mucho cariÃąo y respeto.Â 

Se trata de El ÃvilaâĶ Una enorme montaÃąa de mÃĄs de dos mil metros de altura, que sirve como muralla natural entre la ciudad de Caracas y la costa del Caribe.
En esta montaÃąa podemos encontrar un parque nacional y en la cima de uno de sus picosâĶ Un extravagante hotel de lujo, construido en los aÃąos 50sâĶ Pero que estuvo abandonado durante mÃĄs de 50 aÃąosâĶ Y hoy guarda una de las historias mÃĄs interesantes de la vida de los Venezolanos.

Para que puedas entender mejor la importancia que tuvo para mi viaje por Venezuela, el haberme podido hospedar en este hotel... Te voy a platicar la primera parte de la historia del hotel Humboldt y mÃĄs adelante, cuando entremos juntos a conocerlo, podrÃĄs comprender por quÃĐ este hotel, se ha vuelto tan enigmÃĄtico para los venezolanos.

snippet.title: Starship | SN11 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Tuesday, March 30, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 11 (SN11) â our fourth high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from Starbase in Texas. Similar to previous high-altitude flight tests of Starship, SN11 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee â approximately 10 km in altitude. SN11 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starshipâs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN11âs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceXâs fourth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.description:
Durante miles de aÃąos, los matemÃĄticos calcularon Pi de forma obvia pero numÃĐricamente ineficiente. Entonces llegÃģ Newton y cambiÃģ el juego.

Un agradecimiento especial a Alex Kontorovich, Profesor de MatemÃĄticas de la Universidad de Rutgers, y Profesor Visitante Distinguido para la DifusiÃģn PÃšblica de las MatemÃĄticas Museo Nacional de MatemÃĄticas MoMath por formar parte de este vÃ­deo del DÃ­a de Pi.

ÏâïļLa ridÃ­cula forma en la que se calculaba PiâĶ hasta queâĶ llegÃģ Isaac NewtonðŦ

Este descubrimiento transformÃē la manera en que calculamos para siempre.
Para muchos cientÃ­ficos Isaac Newton ha sido el mÃĄs grande cientÃ­fico de todos los tiempos
Una de sus mÃĄs grandes contribuciones fue expresar el comportamiento fÃ­sico de la naturaleza en forma de leyes naturales, demostrando que las que gobiernan el movimiento en la Tierra y las que gobiernan el movimiento de los cuerpos celestes son las mismas.
Destacan sus trabajos sobre la naturaleza de la luz y la Ãģptica y el desarrollo del cÃĄlculo matemÃĄtico. Desarrollo la ley de convecciÃģn tÃĐrmica, sus estudios sobre la velocidad del sonido en el aire; y su propuesta de una teorÃ­a sobre el origen de las estrellas. Fue tambiÃĐn un pionero de la mecÃĄnica de fluidos, estableciendo una ley sobre la viscosidad.
El gran mÃĐrito de Newton fue tomar los conocimientos de Galileo y Kepler y a partir de sus discusiones con Hyugens,Leibniz,Halley sobre todo,Robert Hooke y formular leyes que explican tanto el movimiento de los astros como el de los movimientos de cualquier otro objeto y de paso la mecÃĄnica de las mÃĄquinas.
